title: Kathakali
desc: Amudhavel, a simpleton, gets embroiled in the murder of Thamba, a local gangster. The police think that he is the culprit as he had a conflict with him in the past.

title: Amma Ammaayiyamma
desc: Prabhavathy, one of five children, marries a rich businessman, Shekharankutty, and forgets about her family. Her husband decides to make her understand the importance of her family.

title: Ee Parakkum Thalika
desc: Unni, a bus owner, tries several ways to improve the condition of his bus, which is named after his late father. Things take a turn when the daughter of a powerful politician enters his life.

title: Madraskaaran
desc: Sathya, an engineer-turned-farmer, lives peacefully in Kovilpatti with his family. His life is disrupted when he is attacked by henchmen sent by his enemy, Singam.

title: Aathi
desc: A young boy moves to Chennai for his education where he meets a girl and falls in love with her. Soon, they learn that they are both on a mission to avenge the death of their parents.
